description: Style NotePair of shoes with a fun twist, this piece from catwalk is for those who are tired of the standard foot staples. Pair these with a short pleated skirt for an emo-style vibe or with rolled up denims (we recommend colour pop ones!) and a tonal tee.Product DetailsWhite mid top shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailingThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and raised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3& rdquo
